title: V Brake Pads, 2 Pairs of Bike Brake Pads,70mm V Brake Blocks (with Hex Nuts and Washers), Universal Bike Brake Pads, 1 PC Allen Wrench, for Road Bikes Mountain Bikes
features: 【Bicycle Brake Block Set】2 pairs of V-shaped bicycle brakes (with hex nuts) and L-shaped hex wrench for installation and removal. They are a great replacement for worn bike brake pads.
【Brake pad size】70 mm/2.76 inches long, 10 - 14 mm/0.39 - 0.55 inches wide, 38 mm/1.50 inches high; lightweight and portable, convenient for long-distance riding

【Premium Braking Performance】The unique V-shaped sand guide groove prevents damage caused by sand, mud and stones on the rim when braking. The slightly curved design does not harm the wheels and provides better braking power. Ideal braking performance for your daily riding life and various road conditions

【High-Quality Material】 Made of natural rubber, it is wear-resistant, decontamination and noise-reducing, and has no squeaking sound when braking. Parts made of alloy steel are extremely durable and suitable for all weather conditions. Better materials, safer ride, more fun.

【Easy Installation】The installation direction is marked on each bicycle brake pad, and the nuts and washers have been installed on the brake pads in the correct order. All you need to do is remove the accessories, put the brake pads into the bicycle, and press Install and repair in original order.
description: Procudt Specification Brake Pads Material: Hyathetic Fiber and Nitrile Rubber Brake Pads Lenght: 2.76inches, Width: 1.56inches Brake Pads Thickness: 0.47inches Brake Pads Color: Black,Red Hex Nut and Spacers Material: Aluminum Alloy Hex Wrench Material: Stainless Steel Package Includes 2 Paris*Brake Pads 1PCS*Allen Wrench [Disclaimer: While our V brake pads are designed to provide exceptional braking performance, it's essential to ensure proper installation and maintenance. Always consult your bike manufacturer's guidelines and seek professional assistance if needed.]
